title: Nizhny Novgorod, Nizhny Novgorod Oblast — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Nizhny Novgorod is a city in Nizhny Novgorod Oblast with a population of 1,250,000. A major Volga River city, a historic trading center with a magnificent Kremlin, and a thriving IT and industrial sector.
